entryRequirements.visaNote: Same as Delhi — e-Visa/ETA required in advance for most nationalities.
entryRequirements.officialSource: Bureau of Immigration, Government of India

transportInfo.paymentCard: Mumbai Metro smart card; local trains use separate ticketing
mainSystems: Mumbai Suburban Railway (the iconic 'local trains' — extremely crowded at rush hour)
transportInfo.note: Avoid the suburban rail system during rush hour as a first-time visitor — it is famously overcrowded; app taxis are a more comfortable option for short trips.

publicHolidays2026: Same national Indian holidays as Delhi, plus regional Maharashtra-specific days (e.g., Gudi Padwa) — confirm regional calendar separately.
majorEventsNote: Ganesh Chaturthi (Aug/Sep, exact date varies) is Mumbai's single biggest cultural event — massive street processions, worth experiencing but expect major crowding and transport disruption.
